sources.name: 📺 模拟央视（测试二级选集）

customHandlers.mockCctvListHandler: function(ctx) { let docs = [ { column_name: '新闻联播', lastVIDE: { videoSharedCode: 'mock_news_001' }, column_logo: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=1' }, { column_name: '焦点访谈', lastVIDE: { videoSharedCode: 'mock_focus_002' }, column_logo: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=2' }, { column_name: '今日说法', lastVIDE: { videoSharedCode: 'mock_legal_003' }, column_logo: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=3' } ]; return docs.map(vod => ({ vod_id: `###${vod.column_name}###${vod.lastVIDE.videoSharedCode}###${vod.column_logo}`, vod_name: vod.column_name, vod_pic: vod.column_logo })); }
customHandlers.mockCctvDetailHandler: function(ctx) { let parts = ctx.vodId.split('###'); if (parts.length < 3) return { list: [] }; let title = parts[1]; let code = parts[2]; let logo = parts[3]; let episodes = []; if (title === '新闻联播') { for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) { episodes.push({ title: `2025-01-${i.toString().padStart(2,'0')} 新闻联播`, url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' }); } } else if (title === '焦点访谈') { for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) { episodes.push({ title: `2025-01-${i.toString().padStart(2,'0')} 焦点访谈`, url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' }); } } else { episodes.push({ title: '今日说法 2025-01-01', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' }); } let videoList = episodes.map(ep => `${ep.title}$${ep.url}`); let playUrl = videoList.join('#'); let vod = { vod_id: ctx.vodId, vod_name: title, vod_pic: logo, type_name: '模拟央视', vod_play_from: 'CCTV', vod_play_url: playUrl }; return { list: [vod] }; }
customHandlers.mockCctvPlayHandler: function(ctx) { let pid = ctx.id; // 如果 pid 是完整 URL 则直接使用，否则用测试流 if (pid.startsWith('http')) { return { parse: 0, playUrl: '', url: pid }; } else { return { parse: 0, playUrl: '', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' }; } }
